text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking by the track when I happen
to hear what sounds like a commotion.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Th-there's a fight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's something I can't overlook. I rush towards
the source of all the noise, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah, now zat's the spirit! Show me whatcha
got, and don't either of you dare lose!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aww, what? A draw? How 'bout you two settle the
score with a casual race?!
choice_data_list: You shouldn't be holding races by yourselves.
You shouldn't be holding races by yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yowza! You scared me! But don't be such a
buzzkill. These two're in the middle of a fight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don'tcha supervise the race?
Then it'll be a nice 'n proper scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, live a little. Fire and fight is what
makes Edo bright. And seeing that fight in a
scrimmage is what Tracen's all about!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Give the okay and let 'em compete already!
C'mon, we gotta settle this, Edo-style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I find myself wrangled into overseeing the
scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There ya go, good start! Now look alive and
proud! Feel that sunshine beamin' down on ya!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Go gooo! Close that gap! Hey, you in the lead!
Don't just give up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Maan, whatta race that was! Came down to a
nose too! And just lookit those bright smiles on
their faces!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Us Umamusume were born for this stuff. Now, to
wrap things up nicely...
choice_data_list: You could finish things with a bang.
You could get them a drink.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Good thinkin'. Then let's finish this with some
stylin' clappin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You two put on one helluva show! As thanks, on
my mark, let's all clap in unison to finish off!
Yooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Inari One's cue, the three of them clap
their hands together in sync, sending a clear
sound ringing through the clear blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, nothin' like a cold drink to wash away
any bitter feelings, right? Good thinkin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! How'd ya like a nice cold drink to
cool off?!
